---
title: "The Old Looking-Glass, or, Mrs Dorothy Cope’s Recollections of Service"
---

## The Old Looking-Glass, or, Mrs Dorothy Cope’s Recollections of Service

**Author:** Maria Louisa Charlesworth
**Date:** 1878 [1877]
**Imprint:** London: Seeley

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
